activities.name: Seed Counting & Graphing
activities.description: Count different seeds in sorting trays, create simple bar graphs showing which seed type is most/least numerous
activities.integration_point: Data collection and graphing from seed sorting activity

activities.name: Plant Measurement
activities.description: Measure height of classroom plants using unifix cubes or rulers, record and compare growth over time
activities.integration_point: Non-standard measurement and number comparison

activities.name: Living Things Patterns
activities.description: Identify and create patterns using animal movement cards (fly-fly-swim, walk-walk-crawl)
activities.integration_point: Pattern recognition and extension

activities.name: Animal Addition Stories
activities.description: Solve simple addition word problems about animals (3 birds sat on a tree, 2 more flew away - how many left?)
activities.integration_point: Addition and subtraction in real context

activities.name: Living Things Class Book
activities.description: Students write and illustrate pages for a class book about their favorite living thing from the nature walk
activities.integration_point: Opinion writing with reasons, illustration captions

activities.name: Animal Research Pals
activities.description: Partner reading of animal books, students share 3 facts they learned with their partner
activities.integration_point: Reading informational text, speaking and listening

activities.name: Living vs Non-Living Vocabulary
activities.description: Create illustrated word walls for vocabulary: grow, breathe, respond, habitat, needs
activities.integration_point: Science vocabulary development and spelling

activities.name: Observation Journal Writing
activities.description: Write 2-3 sentences about goldfish observations using sentence starters ('I noticed...', 'The fish can...')
activities.integration_point: Informational writing, using complete sentences

activities.name: Leaf Rubbing Collages
activities.description: Create leaf rubbings using crayons and paper, combine into nature collages
activities.integration_point: Texture observation, mixed media art technique

activities.name: Animal Habitats Diorama
activities.description: Build 3D habitats in shoeboxes using clay, paper, and natural materials
activities.integration_point: Sculpture and spatial awareness, understanding animal needs

activities.name: My Living Body Portrait
activities.description: Draw self-portrait showing external body parts (head, arms, legs, eyes, ears)
activities.integration_point: Human body recognition, proportion awareness

activities.name: Plant Parts Painting
activities.description: Paint observations of real plants - roots, stems, leaves using watercolors
activities.integration_point: Observational painting, plant structure awareness

activities.name: Caring for Living Things
activities.description: Discuss responsibilities of pet owners and gardeners, create a class promise for caring for classroom plants/animals
activities.integration_point: Community responsibility, citizenship

activities.name: Local Living Things
activities.description: Map the schoolyard showing where different living things were found during nature walk
activities.integration_point: Map skills, local geography, spatial awareness

activities.name: How Families Care for Each Other
activities.description: Connect to how animal families care for their young, compare to human family care
activities.integration_point: Family structures, nurturing behaviors across species

activities.name: Traditional Foods & Living Things
activities.description: Discuss how different cultures relate to living things for food, medicine, and ceremony (connect to First Peoples perspective)
activities.integration_point: Cultural awareness, Indigenous knowledge connections

activities.name: Animal Movement Dance
activities.description: Move like different animals (hop like a rabbit, slither like a snake, fly like a bird) to music
activities.integration_point: Gross motor skills, animal characteristics, rhythm

activities.name: Plant Growth Song
activities.description: Sing songs about plant growth with motions (seed sleeps, rain falls, sun shines, sprout grows)
activities.integration_point: Sequencing, memory, movement while learning plant needs

activities.name: Living Things Sounds
activities.description: Listen to recordings of animal sounds, identify which animal, discuss how animals use sound to communicate
activities.integration_point: Sound identification, communication concepts

activities.name: Our Bodies Living Things
activities.description: Discuss how our bodies are living things that need food, water, sleep, and exercise
activities.integration_point: Personal health, body awareness, healthy choices

activities.name: Animal Walks
activities.description: Physical activity where students move around the room like different animals, discussing how each moves
activities.integration_point: Gross motor development, understanding animal adaptations

activities.name: Healthy Snacks from Plants
activities.description: Identify plant parts we eat (carrots=roots, lettuce=leaves, apples=fruit), make simple healthy snack
activities.integration_point: Nutrition, plant anatomy, food sources

activities.name: Senses Exploration
activities.description: Use senses to explore living things - smell herbs, feel plant stems, observe goldfish, listen to bird calls
activities.integration_point: Five senses, scientific observation
